title: LLMQuotaRisk
description: Per-(tenant, provider, model, region, kind) rolling snapshot of provider rate-limit signals — used_ratio, seconds_to_reset, and a transparent linear risk_score. Signal-only: the event carries no recommendation, no routing hint, and no enforcement decision. Routing / throttling / fallback logic on these signals is outside this event contract.

source.description: Discriminator for the surface that produced this snapshot. quota-risk emits 'worker'.

kind.description: Quota dimension this snapshot describes (e.g. 'tokens', 'requests'). Free-form — the parser per provider chooses the canonical label.

remaining.description: Remaining quota units reported by the provider. May be zero or negative when the provider has not supplied a header.

limit.description: Quota limit reported by the provider. Zero when only the remaining count is known.

used_ratio.description: Ratio of used quota to limit. Zero when has_denominator is false.

has_denominator.description: True when the limit is known and used_ratio is meaningful.

seconds_to_reset.description: Seconds until the provider's quota window resets, when reported.

risk_score.description: Transparent linear score derived from used_ratio and seconds_to_reset. The function is documented in the worker README; it is intentionally NOT a scoring engine — the OSS layer publishes the input signal only.

observed_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the most recent header observation that fed this snapshot.

snapshot_emitted_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp at which the refresh loop emitted this snapshot.
